macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Asian stocks rise cautiously as investors digest BOJ rate hike and Iran-deal optimism
items.summary: Asian equities posted modest gains after a previous rally tied to reports of a U.S.-Iran peace deal, while investors also weighed a widely expected Bank of Japan rate hike to 1%, its highest policy rate since 1995. The Nikkei briefly crossed 70,000 to a record high, while S&P 500 futures were slightly lower and Hong Kong stocks lagged on weak China data.

items.title: Wall Street rallies on Iran deal optimism, with S&P 500 and Nasdaq posting strong gains
items.summary: U.S. stocks and bonds surged in the previous session as investors welcomed reports of a U.S.-Iran peace deal. The S&P 500 rose 1.7% and the Nasdaq Composite jumped 3.1%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the STOXX 600 closed at record highs.

items.title: Bank of Japan raises benchmark rate to 1%, a 31-year high
items.summary: The Bank of Japan voted 7-1 to lift its benchmark policy rate to 1%, the highest level since 1995. The move came as markets assessed whether recent inflation and growth trends justify further policy normalization.

items.title: RBA leaves rates unchanged while Asia FX and equities react to central bank divergence
items.summary: The Reserve Bank of Australia kept interest rates on hold as expected, leaving the Australian dollar little changed. The decision came alongside broader Asian market moves that reflected both central bank developments and shifting risk sentiment.

items.title: U.S. economic data show slower growth and stronger-than-expected labor market resilience
items.summary: Recent U.S. data showed Q1 GDP revised down to 1.6% from an initial 2.0% estimate, with weaker inventory investment offset by still-strong final sales to domestic purchasers. May payrolls rose by 172,000, more than expected, while the unemployment rate held at 4.3%.

items.title: Treasury yields and Nasdaq react to stronger jobs data and sticky inflation worries
items.summary: A stronger-than-expected payrolls report pushed the two-year Treasury yield up 22 basis points, while the Nasdaq sold off more than 4% on the day cited in the commentary. The moves reflected renewed concern that persistent core inflation could delay Fed easing.

items.title: Fed keeps policy rates unchanged at 5.25%-5.50%
items.summary: Market coverage reported that the Federal Reserve left interest rates unchanged at 5.25%-5.50%, in line with expectations. Chair Powell's press conference followed the decision as investors looked for signals on the timing of any future cuts.

items.title: Honda pauses plans for electric vehicle factory in Canada
items.summary: Market headlines reported that Honda will put its planned EV factory in Canada on hold. The announcement adds to signs that automakers are reassessing near-term capital spending in the electric vehicle sector.

items.title: OPEC trims forecast for global oil demand growth in 2026
items.summary: OPEC's monthly report cut its forecast for 2026 global oil demand growth to 1.0 million barrels per day from 1.2 million previously. The revision suggests a slightly softer demand outlook even as energy markets remain sensitive to geopolitical developments.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: U.S. Commerce order forces suspension of two frontier AI models
items.summary: On June 12, the U.S. Department of Commerce ordered a leading AI developer to suspend foreign national access to two frontier models over national security concerns tied to a reported jailbreak exploit. The company temporarily disabled access for all customers while challenging the order and working to resolve the issue.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
